metadata.title: Bigbank — High School Software Engineer @ Nightbears Technology
metadata.description: Portfolio of Bigbank (Nattapong Pongnukrohsiri) — High School Software Engineer @ Nightbears Technology delivering full-service digital solutions.

hero.badge: Available for Projects via Nightbears Tech
hero.name: Bigbank
hero.description: A high schooler passionate about coding and a Software Engineer at Nightbears Technology. Despite my age, I'm ready to tackle enterprise-level projects, turning your ideas into functional apps and websites.

about.label: About
about.title: Nice to meet you!
about.description1: I'm Nattapong Pongnukrohsiri (Bigbank), a High School Software Engineer from Nightbears Technology. I started with a deep passion for coding and developed my skills until I earned the opportunity to work at a real Software House, delivering top-tier solutions.
about.description2: Age is no barrier to innovation! From web development (Next.js, React) to mobile applications (Flutter), my expert team at Nightbears and I are ready to handle your project from start to finish.

skills.label: Skills
skills.title: Tech Stack
skills.description: I use modern technologies to build high-performance websites.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.title: Featured Projects
portfolio.description: A showcase of websites I've designed and developed for clients.

blog.label: Blog
blog.title: Knowledge Sharing
blog.description: Articles about web development, tips, tricks, and experiences.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Ready to build with us?
contact.description: Interested in developing software, an app, or bringing your idea to life? Contact me and the Nightbears Technology team today. Free consultation available!
